action.hypothesis: At K=16, a discrete coarse-codebook-plus-sparse-correction mechanism may outperform the current frontier if the main remaining error is in coarse support selection rather than additional routing or grouping. `lowrank_residual_vq` is a fundamentally different existing family from the recent soft-codebook/two-stage variants, and its prior K=24 result suggests it is the strongest remaining discrete-style candidate to probe at the smaller-K slot.
action.summary: Severe stagnation has reached 22 non-improving rounds, so this round should avoid minor tweaks and avoid opening another new code-edit branch immediately. The next defensible move is a fundamentally different existing architecture at the more valuable smaller-K slot: test `lowrank_residual_vq` at `K=16` with the fixed EF=12/signum/LR=3.2e-3/AUXK recipe to see whether a hard residual codebook backbone can produce a non-dominated K=16 tradeoff where recent soft-codebook selector variants did not.
action.self_review: This keeps one hypothesis and uses an already integrated family, which is appropriate after repeated unsuccessful new-family branches. The main risk is that the discrete residual codebook may still underperform at tighter sparsity, but it is a genuinely different mechanism and has enough prior signal to justify a K=16 probe.
notes_to_memory: Round 121 should satisfy severe-stagnation policy with a fundamentally different existing architecture rather than another tweak or another new code-edit family.

`lowrank_residual_vq` is already integrated and previously produced one of the more competitive non-frontier K=24 results among the discrete/quantized branches, so K=16 is the highest-value missing smaller-K slot for this family under the fixed recipe.
Keep the override set minimal and exact so the result is attributable to architecture alone at K=16.
next_hypotheses: If `lowrank_residual_vq` is competitive at K=16, follow with K=24 confirmation only if needed to map whether the benefit persists across the mid-K band.
If it clearly loses at K=16, continue severe-stagnation search with another fundamentally different existing family rather than more soft-codebook two-stage variants.
If it is close but noisy at K=16, run one confirmatory repeat before promoting or discarding the family.
